name: RPlog_Question_Answered
title: Question Answered
summary: In the towering Library of the Republic on Ord Mantell, the Chyleni officer Kyrin Sh'vani receives unsolicited intelligence from the doctor Lynae Cassius, who passes along sensor data and a flat, final piece of news: Grand Admiral Danik Kreldin is dead, on the word of Darth Malign himself. Lynae makes clear this is not a negotiation and that she wants nothing in return, professing indifference to how history will judge her. Kyrin, masking her surprise, promises to carry the information -- third-hand and of dubious reliability though it is -- to those who can properly assess it and act on it. The brief exchange quietly resolves a lingering question about Kreldin's fate.
